description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise upholstered in a smooth, dark material, likely faux leather or leather. The chaise features a left-side extended lounge section and a right-side standard sofa seat, both with thick, plush seat cushions. The backrest is divided into three distinct, evenly sized segments, each with a slightly angled, padded cushion for comfort. Both ends of the chaise have wide, rectangular armrests that are the same height as the backrest, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The legs are short and minimally visible, suggesting a sturdy, low-profile base. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or outdoor lounge areas in parks or communal spaces.
description: A modern, L-shaped chaise with dark, smooth upholstery, three backrest cushions, and wide armrests on both sides. The design is sleek and plush, ideal for urban lounge settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three backrest cushions, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, segmented backrest and the solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended lounge section and the right armrest profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is composed of three evenly sized, rectangular padded cushions, each slightly angled for ergonomic support. The design is simple and modern, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both the left and right sides, wide and rectangular in shape, matching the height of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-like, and minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal, providing a sturdy and low-profile base without decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid and smooth, with no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached backrest cushions and two main seat cushions, with the left section forming an extended lounge. The cushions are thick and plush, arranged for both comfort and visual symmetry.
